task_completion.description: Open and read the standard operating procedure manual to identify the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_ops_manual.txt.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and navigate to the vehicle parameters setup screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl application is open, connected to the vehicle, and the 'Parameters' tab under Vehicle Setup is selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the 4 FENCE parameters according to the manual.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Parameter search or edit dialogs in QGroundControl showing FENCE_ALT_MAX set to 45, FENCE_RADIUS set to 10, FENCE_ENABLE set to 1, and FENCE_ACTION set to 3.

task_completion.description: Configure the RTL altitude and waypoint speed parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Parameter search or edit dialogs in QGroundControl showing RTL_ALT set to 0 and WPNAV_SPEED_UP set to 100.
Parameter search or edit dialog in QGroundControl showing FS_BATT_ENABLE set to 0.

task_completion.description: Export the configured parameters to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog in QGroundControl (e.g., via Tools -> Save to file) or terminal confirmation showing the parameters being saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_config.params.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QGroundControl application to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGroundControl GUI being actively used to search and change parameters, rather than the agent just writing a text file.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl export functionality to create the params file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl 'Save to file' dialog or parameter export tool being used, rather than a text editor manually creating tether_config.params.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the evaluation result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands or text editors should be seen creating or modifying /tmp/task_result.json directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The manual is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_ops_manual.txt. The exact parameters that must be configured in QGroundControl are: FENCE_ALT_MAX: 45, FENCE_RADIUS: 10, FENCE_ENABLE: 1, FENCE_ACTION: 3, RTL_ALT: 0, WPNAV_SPEED_UP: 100, and FS_BATT_ENABLE: 0. The final configuration must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_config.params.
